name: Bomb Manual From Hell
description: Drag, rotate, and flip five transparent manual leaves onto their physical key pins, then cut the only wire exposed through all five aperture sets.
natural_language: Register all five transparent manual plates, then cut the only wire left exposed.

metadata.notes: Five asymmetric acetate plates have seeded rotations, mirror states, and key-pin registrations. Their five-aperture sets intersect at exactly one of nine physical wires.
